subcodes.first_line: O my two faithful friends! Your detailed letter was received and its contents were understood, and the sighs and lamentations of heart and soul [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو یار باوفای من نامه مفصل شما رسید مضمون مفهوم گردید و آه و فغان دل و جان
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @consolation and comfort, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @praise and encouragement
